001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004
005import android.view.View;
006import android.view.ViewGroup.MarginLayoutParams;
007import androidx.activity.EdgeToEdge;
008import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
009import androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBar;
010import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity;
011import androidx.core.graphics.Insets;
012import androidx.core.view.ViewCompat;
013import androidx.core.view.WindowInsetsCompat;
014import androidx.navigation.NavController;
015import androidx.navigation.fragment.NavHostFragment;
016import androidx.navigation.ui.AppBarConfiguration;
017import androidx.navigation.ui.NavigationUI;
018import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.R;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.databinding.ActivityMainBinding;
021
022/**
023 * Main activity for the Fossil Sweeper application. Manages the navigation host and handles
024 * edge-to-edge display with appropriate window insets.
025 */
026@AndroidEntryPoint
027public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {
028
029  private ActivityMainBinding binding;
030  private NavController navController;
031  private AppBarConfiguration barConfig;
032
033  @Override
034  protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
035    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
036    binding = ActivityMainBinding.inflate(getLayoutInflater());
037    EdgeToEdge.enable(this);
038    ViewCompat.setOnApplyWindowInsetsListener(binding.getRoot(), MainActivity::adjustInsets);
039    setupNavigation();
040    setContentView(binding.getRoot());
041  }
042
043  /**
044   * Adjusts view margins to accommodate system window insets (status bar, navigation bar, etc.).
045   *
046   * @param view The view to adjust.
047   * @param insets Window insets from the system.
048   * @return WindowInsetsCompat.CONSUMED to indicate insets have been handled.
049   */
050  private static @NonNull WindowInsetsCompat adjustInsets(
051      @NonNull View view, @NonNull WindowInsetsCompat insets) {
052    Insets bounds = insets.getInsets(WindowInsetsCompat.Type.systemBars());
053    MarginLayoutParams params = (MarginLayoutParams) view.getLayoutParams();
054    params.setMargins(bounds.left, bounds.top, bounds.right, bounds.bottom);
055    view.setLayoutParams(params);
056    return WindowInsetsCompat.CONSUMED;
057  }
058
059  @Override
060  public boolean onSupportNavigateUp() {
061    return NavigationUI.navigateUp(navController, barConfig);
062  }
063
064  /**
065   * Configures the navigation controller and action bar behavior based on the current destination.
066   * Hides the action bar when on the login fragment.
067   */
068  private void setupNavigation() {
069    barConfig = new AppBarConfiguration.Builder(R.id.main_fragment).build();
070    NavHostFragment host = binding.navHostFragmentContainer.getFragment();
071    navController = host.getNavController();
072    navController.addOnDestinationChangedListener((controller, destination, arguments) -> {
073      ActionBar bar = getSupportActionBar();
074      if (bar != null) {
075        if (destination.getId() == R.id.login_fragment) {
076          bar.hide();
077        } else {
078          bar.show();
079        }
080      }
081    });
082    NavigationUI.setupActionBarWithNavController(this, navController, barConfig);
083  }
084
085}
